creator: cem@freebsd.org
text:
I don't think turboboost corresponds directly to P-states.  My understanding is that turboboost/CPB can happen automatically any time the processor is in P0 (the nominal 3300 MHz state).

This is the same as on Zen+ and Zen1.

The hwpstate0 / Cool'n'Quiet driver is just the one that provides P-state control:

    dev.cpu.0.freq_levels: 3300/4021 1700/1615 1400/1277
